data.body: Implemented + pushed to Gerrit (stacked). cliff.toml (Keep-a-Changelog; feat/fix/breaking-first/perf+refactor=Changed/docs; build/ci/chore/test skipped; catch-all; header records towncrier/PR-label/Releases-only rejections). CHANGELOG.md bootstrapped back to v0.1.0 (12 sections, Unreleased, compare-links). Makefile GIT_CLIFF_VERSION=2.13.1 pin + prepend-scoped idempotent 'make changelog VERSION=' target (verified idempotent + VERSION guard). releasing.md pin+step+dial-note; pyproject Changelog->CHANGELOG.md; release-notes pointer. All ACs grep-verified; lint+toml-check green. Awaiting Verified+1.
